metrics.name: actionable_chase_count
metrics.label: 今日可追檔數
metrics.business_use: Tell the user how many stocks are worth watching at the open.
metrics.good_value: Usually 1-5. Too many names may indicate an overheated or noisy screen.
metrics.caveats: A candidate is not a buy order; opening price and volume must still confirm.

metrics.name: signal_win_rate_5d
metrics.label: 訊號 5 日勝率
metrics.calculation: completed signals with return_5d > 0 divided by completed signals
metrics.business_use: Measure whether the selection rules are producing useful short-term signals.
metrics.good_value: Above 50% with positive average return; below 50% triggers reason-tag review.
metrics.caveats: Small samples can mislead. Always review completed count.

metrics.name: potential_radar_conversion_rate
metrics.label: 潛力雷達轉強率
metrics.calculation: potential records that become formal S/A signals within the tracking window divided by completed potential records
metrics.business_use: Validate whether the radar finds early-stage names before they become daily picks.
metrics.good_value: Higher than baseline daily screen conversion rate.
metrics.caveats: Potential radar is a research queue, not a buy list.

metrics.name: knowledge_adjustment_effect
metrics.label: 智慧庫修正效果
metrics.calculation: Compare outcomes after knowledge warnings/downgrades against unadjusted comparable signals.
metrics.business_use: Confirm whether historical lessons actually improve decisions.
metrics.good_value: Warnings reduce loss rate or avoid negative average-return setups.
metrics.caveats: Knowledge rules should be conservative until enough live samples are available.

metrics.name: theme_heat_trend
metrics.label: 題材熱度趨勢
metrics.calculation: Daily theme headline intensity and 3-day average, plus trend label.
metrics.business_use: Identify themes moving from background research into active market attention.
metrics.good_value: Rising heat with matching volume, fundamentals, or policy catalysts.
metrics.caveats: Headline heat alone is not enough; avoid pure news chasing.
